page.title: Weekly Yacht Rental Marbella: 7-Day Charter Guide

data.meta_description: Plan your weekly yacht rental Marbella with our 7-day charter guide. Explore Puerto Banús, Estepona & Cabopino from €749/2h. Book your week today.
data.summary: A complete 7-day guide to weekly yacht rental Marbella, covering itineraries, pricing from €749/2h, and top destinations like Puerto Banús, Estepona, and Cabopino.
key_facts: Weekly yacht rental Marbella starts from €749/2h on Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39).
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.
Mangusta 80 variants offer jet ski included free on 4h+ bookings.
Fleet ranges from 6.4m speedboats (5 pax) to 29m Ferretti 94 (12 pax).
Departures from Puerto Banús; explore Marbella, Estepona, Sotogrande, and Cabopino.
Pricing on request for larger yachts via WhatsApp—no hidden fees.
7-day itineraries mix coastal cruising, beach clubs, and sunset anchorages.

faq.q: What is included in a weekly yacht rental Marbella?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No extra fees—just show up and enjoy.

faq.q: How much does a weekly yacht rental Marbella cost?
faq.a: Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) cost €749 for 2 hours up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Mangusta 80 variants start at €4,719 for 4 hours. All other yachts are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Can I rent a yacht for a full week in Marbella?
faq.a: Yes, weekly charters are available. Contact us via WhatsApp for multi-day pricing on any boat. Our fleet includes options from 5 to 12 passengers, all departing Puerto Banús.

faq.q: What destinations can I visit on a weekly yacht rental?
faq.a: Popular spots include Marbella Marina, Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande, Cala del Faro, and Cala Cortés. Each offers unique beaches, beach clubs, and anchorages within easy cruising distance.

faq.q: Do I need a boating license for a weekly rental?
faq.a: No, a licensed skipper is included with every charter. You relax while the captain navigates, anchors, and ensures safety. Perfect for first-timers.

faq.q: What is the largest yacht available for weekly rental?
faq.a: The Ferretti 94 at 29m accommodates up to 12 passengers. Also available: Canados 86 (26m), Maiora 26m, and Mangusta 80 (24m). All depart Puerto Banús.

faq.q: How do I book a weekly yacht rental Marbella?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing. We'll confirm your preferred boat, dates, and itinerary. Payment secures the booking with no hidden charges.

faq.q: What is the best time of year for a weekly yacht rental?
faq.a: May to October offers warm 25-30°C weather, calm seas, and long daylight hours. July and August are peak season—book early for weekly slots.

data.body_html:
Planning a weekly yacht rental Marbella gives you the freedom to explore the Costa del Sol at your own pace. From the glamour of Puerto Banús to the serene coves of Cabopino, a week on the water unlocks hidden beaches, beach clubs, and sunset anchorages. Our fleet at Boat Rental Marbella ranges from sporty 6.4m speedboats to 29m superyachts, all with licensed skippers and inclusive pricing. This guide covers itineraries, costs, and tips for making the most of seven days afloat.

Why Choose a Weekly Yacht Rental Marbella?

A weekly charter lets you slow down and truly absorb the coast. Instead of a rushed afternoon, you can wake up in a different bay each day, dine at beach clubs like Playa Padre or Nikki Beach, and anchor overnight in calm spots. With fuel and crew included, there’s no stress—just Mediterranean living. Our boats depart from Puerto Banús, the heart of Marbella’s yachting scene, giving you instant access to the Golden Mile and beyond.

Our Fleet for Weekly Rentals

We offer over 15 boats for weekly bookings, each with a licensed skipper. Here’s a quick overview of popular options:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) – €749/2h to €2,299/8h
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) – Same Tier A pricing
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) – From €4,719/4h, includes jet ski
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – Pricing on request
  • Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) – Perfect for shorter trips

For weekly rates on any yacht, contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote. All charters include drinks, snacks, insurance, and IVA.

Sample 7-Day Itinerary for Weekly Yacht Rental Marbella

Here’s a flexible plan that mixes exploration and relaxation:

  • Day 1: Depart Puerto Banús, cruise to Marbella Marina, swim at Cala del Faro, lunch at a chiringuito.
  • Day 2: Head east to Cabopino, anchor at the dunes, visit Playa Artola.
  • Day 3: West to Estepona, explore the old town and marina, anchor at Cala Cortés.
  • Day 4: South to Sotogrande, enjoy the exclusive port and beach clubs.
  • Day 5: Chill day—sunset cruise from Puerto Banús to Río Verde, snorkel.
  • Day 6: Longer run to Gibraltar for lunch (clearance required), return via La Concha views.
  • Day 7: Final morning swim at a favourite cove, return to Puerto Banús.

Each day covers 10-20 NM, leaving plenty of time for swimming and sunbathing.

Pricing for Weekly Yacht Rental Marbella

All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and taxes. No hidden fees. Use these as a starting point:

Boat2 Hours4 Hours8 Hours
Astondoa 40 / Azimut 39€749€1,299€2,299
Mangusta 80 (all)N/A€4,719On request
Other yachtsPricing on request via WhatsApp

Weekly discounts are available for multi-day bookings—just ask.

Top Destinations for Your Weekly Charter

Marbella’s coastline offers variety within short distances:

  • Puerto Banús: Glamorous marina, designer shops, and nightlife.
  • Cabo Pino: Natural dunes and quiet beaches, 15 minutes east.
  • Estepona: Charming old town and marina, 20 minutes west.
  • Sotogrande: Luxury port and golf, 30 minutes south.
  • Cala Cortés: Secluded cove near Estepona, perfect for anchoring.

Your skipper knows the best spots for calm waters and good food.

Book Your Weekly Yacht Rental Marbella

Ready to plan your week? Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred dates and boat. We’ll confirm availability, tailor an itinerary, and send a transparent quote. All bookings include our standard inclusions—no surprises. Whether you choose the sporty Azimut 39 or the opulent Ferretti 94, a week on the water is the ultimate Marbella experience.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is included in a weekly yacht rental Marbella?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No extra fees—just show up and enjoy.

How much does a weekly yacht rental Marbella cost?

Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) cost €749 for 2 hours up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Mangusta 80 variants start at €4,719 for 4 hours. All other yachts are priced on request via WhatsApp.

Can I rent a yacht for a full week in Marbella?

Yes, weekly charters are available. Contact us via WhatsApp for multi-day pricing on any boat. Our fleet includes options from 5 to 12 passengers, all departing Puerto Banús.

What destinations can I visit on a weekly yacht rental?

Popular spots include Marbella Marina, Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande, Cala del Faro, and Cala Cortés. Each offers unique beaches, beach clubs, and anchorages within easy cruising distance.

Do I need a boating license for a weekly rental?

No, a licensed skipper is included with every charter. You relax while the captain navigates, anchors, and ensures safety. Perfect for first-timers.

What is the largest yacht available for weekly rental?

The Ferretti 94 at 29m accommodates up to 12 passengers. Also available: Canados 86 (26m), Maiora 26m, and Mangusta 80 (24m). All depart Puerto Banús.

How do I book a weekly yacht rental Marbella?

Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing. We'll confirm your preferred boat, dates, and itinerary. Payment secures the booking with no hidden charges.

What is the best time of year for a weekly yacht rental?

May to October offers warm 25-30°C weather, calm seas, and long daylight hours. July and August are peak season—book early for weekly slots.
